column6:
- Custom-key Mobile enabled (Mk50003 and Mk50009)
- OEM-key Desfire enabled (Kc1 of Lk50003) and standard WaveLynx MFG key (Ks1 of Lk00001)

- CSN's are all truncated to 32 bits (MSB)

NOTE: 4th IQ uses PDK's LEAF key Lk50003 and mobile key Mk50003, but contains an extra custom mobile key Mk50009.
